summary: Tested bug fix for Record Delivery popup account list population and account name display. All features working correctly - Backend APIs return account_name field, Frontend displays account names properly, search/filter works with partial matching.

details: Account list is populated correctly with accounts assigned to the distributor
Account names displayed using account_name field: 'Test Status Validation Company'
Account details shown: city, state, territory, primary indicator, distributor location
Search/filter works with partial matching on account name, city, contact name
Account name displayed correctly in table: 'Test Status Validation Company'
Servicing state shown as secondary info (Goa)
Servicing city (Margao), Location (Test), Type (Primary), Status (Active) all shown correctly

GET /api/distributors/{id}/assigned-acco.returns: account_name, contact_name, contact_number, city, state, territory, delivery_address, servicing_city, distributor_location_id/name, is_primary

GET /api/distributors/accounts/search.returns: account_name, contact_name, contact_number, city, state, territory, account_id, delivery_address

GET /api/distributors/{id}/assignments.returns: account_name correctly populated in assignment records

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test distributor (99fb55dc-532c-4e85-b618-6b8a5e552c04) with assigned account 'Test Status Validation Company'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. Record Delivery dialog and Account Assignments tab both correctly display account_name field. APIs working correctly. Test distributor 'Test' (DIST-0002) has 1 assigned account: 'Test Status Validation Company' (Delhi) servicing Margao, Goa.
verified_bug_fixes: Record Delivery popup now shows account list (was not populating)
Account names displayed correctly using account_name field (was using wrong fields company/name)
Search works with partial matching on account_name, city, contact_name
